name: @mcp-guardian/server
description: Runtime security, cost governance, and health monitoring proxy for MCP infrastructure

scripts.prepublishOnly: tsc && (npm pack --dry-run 2>&1 | grep -q dist/cli.js || (echo 'ERROR: dist/cli.js missing from tarball' && exit 1)) && (node -e "var p=require('./default-policy.yaml'); if(p.policy.default_action!=='block'){console.error('ERROR: default_action must be block, got '+p.policy.default_action);process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null || true) && echo '✅ prepublish checks passed'
